# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- In referee statistics, competition groups should be counted as: Szczebel (I Liga Kobiet, PLS 1. Liga Mężczyzn, II Liga Kobiet, II Liga Mężczyzn), 3 (III Liga Kobiet, III Liga Mężczyzn), J (MW Juniorek, MW Juniorów, MP Juniorek), K (MW/MP Kadetek and Kadetów), MŁ (MW/MP Młodziczek and Młodzików), Mini (Minisiatkówka), Tow (Turniej Towarzyski), PALM (PALM - Liga Międzyuczelniana).
- When updating referee statistics, always include 'Siatkówka plażowa' as a separate 'Plaża' category and exclude beach matches from role counters SI/SII/SS/SG/L (same as Mini and Tow exclusions).

## UI Guidelines
- Use a transparent button background for delete actions in lists, similar to edit actions, with only red text/icon emphasis.
